name: Whey Protein Isolate
description: Ultra-pure whey isolate with 27 g of protein per serving. Mixes instantly and digests fast, ideal post-workout or as a high-protein snack. Available in vanilla and chocolate flavours.

name: Adjustable Dumbbell Set
description: Space-saving adjustable dumbbells with a single dial mechanism. Replaces multiple pairs of weights and comes with a storage tray.

name: Collagen Peptides
description: Grass-fed collagen peptides supporting joint health, skin elasticity, and gut integrity. Unflavoured and dissolves in hot or cold liquids.

name: High-Protein Meal Bar
description: 20 g protein, low sugar, and naturally sweetened. A clean, satisfying bar for busy days with no artificial colours or flavours.

name: Foam Roller Pro
description: High-density EVA foam roller with a textured surface for deep-tissue recovery. Long enough for full back and leg coverage.

name: Creatine Monohydrate
description: Micronised creatine monohydrate that supports strength, power, and muscle volume. 500 g tub with 100 servings.

name: Resistance Band Kit
description: Set of 5 resistance bands with door anchor, ankle straps, and carry bag. Great for home workouts and recovery sessions.

name: Magnesium Glycinate
description: High-absorption magnesium glycinate for sleep quality, muscle relaxation, and stress support. 120 capsules.
